title: Lytool Toilet Plunger Set High Pressure Air Plunger Drain Blaster Gun Powerful Toilet Plunger, Drain Plunger, Sink Plunger for Toilets, Sink, Bathroom, Shower, Kitchen, Pipe, Floor Drain, Sewer
features: EASE OF USE AND POWERFUL PUMP: Simply compress the air and pull the trigger to harness the power of high-pressure compressed air. This powerful toilet plunger can quickly blow away even the toughest blockages in the drain, clearing the blockage within seconds. It is much faster than traditional plungers and snake cleaners, saving you valuable time

COMPLETE CONFIGURATION: This air plunger set includes 4 sizes of suction cups, a converter, an air pump base, an air pump handle, and a storage nail-free sticker, ensuring everything is well-organized and easy to clean. You will have everything you need to get started. The toilet blower can be used in toilets, bathroom vanities, bathtubs, showers, sinks, squatting pans, floor drains, and kitchen pipe blockages

QUICK AND EASY UNCLOGGING: From sinks to shower drains, tubs to toilets, this tool has the attachments to get the job done! The toilet plunger can generate high-pressure air power and effectively deal with various blockages caused by hair, cloth, tea, leaves, grease, oil, and more. The sink plunger is a quick and easy way to clear clogged drains. It's a must-have for every household!

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: The body is made of stainless steel, which is waterproof and rust-proof. The toilet plunger uses thickened natural rubber to create a tight seal when in use, preventing any air pressure leaks. It has a built-in barometer to help you keep track of pressure, and an easy-release trigger to stop the pressure. The high-quality materials ensure the durability of the toilet plunger, which can be reused for years

INCREASING AIR PRESSURE AND USAGE TIPS: For achieve the desired PSI, follow these steps: 1. Slightly pump down until pressure stabilizes. 2. Quickly pump 3 to 5 times to secure the release valve. 3. Continue pumping until the desired pressure is reached. 4.Fully press the plunger head into the toilet drain and exert steady pressure. 5. Ensure that the water level is 5 cm above the rubber head.For splash-proof results, cover the toilet bowl with a plastic protective cover or towel
description: Product Description SAVED ON HAVING TO CALL IN A REAL PLUMBER! The kitchen floor drain toilet drain unblocker is a versatile tool for clearing blocked pipes. It is made of high-quality stainless steel and durable plastic, and comes with various accessories such as sink plugs, floor drain plugs, toilet plugs, and converters. Whether for household or commercial, it provides convenience and comfort.
